antipattern.symptom: "COFFEE" rendered as "C0FF3E" or random glyphs; copy-as-image use case unusable.
antipattern.root-cause: Pipeline picked Flux schnell or SD for text-in-image; text rendering fails outside DALL-E 3 / GPT-4o.
antipattern.fix: Route text-in-image tasks to DALL-E 3 or GPT-4o; keep Flux for non-text creative.

antipattern.symptom: Each regeneration produces wildly different output; retry budget consumed; brand looks chaotic.
antipattern.root-cause: Prompt omits ≥2 of the six dimensions; model fills gaps with random sampling.
antipattern.fix: Enforce 6-element template; lint prompts in CI for missing dimensions. Reject prompts with empty Subject / Style / Lighting.

antipattern.symptom: OpenAI returns 429 spike under campaign launch; pipeline crashes; backlog grows.
antipattern.root-cause: Concurrency set higher than provider tier limit; no exponential backoff.
antipattern.fix: Set concurrency ≤ tier RPM / 60; wrap each call in exponential-backoff retry up to `retry_max`.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline generates likeness of a real public figure → legal threat + platform suspension.
antipattern.root-cause: Pipeline has no pre-prompt safety filter; prompts pass through unchecked.
antipattern.fix: Enable `safety.likeness_block=true`; route all prompts through Stability Safety or OpenAI moderation pre-filter; refuse on likeness or restricted-class detection.
